headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -86.9)
key_insights: Fears trending up 51% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 136 quotes and 98 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.
• While still high, frustration levels dropped from yesterday's peak but remain well above the typical range.
• Optimism crashed into negative territory after yesterday's brief positive showing, with fears staying consistently low.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
